final:
module NVMe_Command_Register (
    input wire clk,
    input wire [7:0] opcode,
    input wire [3:0] tag,
    output reg [7:0] stored_opcode,
    output reg [3:0] stored_tag
);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  stored_opcode <= opcode ;
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  stored_tag <= tag ;
  end
endmodule
